name: Down and Dirty Apple Chutney Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the applesauce and honey, blending well.
2. Add the raisins to the mixture and blend again.
3. Stir in the lemon juice and vinegar, mixing thoroughly.
4. Gradually add all of the remaining ingredients (curry powder, celery salt, tarragon vinegar, dark brown sugar) and blend until fully incorporated.
5. Cover the bowl and chill before serving.
Suggested Dippers: Pound Cake Cubes, Dried Fruit, Steak, Apricots, Melon, Italian Bread Chunks, Croutons
